---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: Ansel-S
---

**Before opening this request, please check PHILOSOPHY.md**

Does this feature conflict with any of the 12 permanent prohibitions?
If yes, it will not be added regardless of demand.

---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem this feature addresses.

**Proposed solution**
Describe what you want to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

**Which module would this belong to?**
(e.g. blocker.rs, echo.rs, tabs.rs, a new module, frontend only)

**Privacy implications**
Does this feature have any privacy trade-offs? How should they be handled?

**Additional context**
Any other context, mockups, or links that might help.
